warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
10 Scap Pull Up
15 Plate I Y T
15 Plate Shoulder Press
15 Push Ups
30sec Cobra Stretch

strength.name: Bench Press
strength.description:
5x3 | * Slide the wheely chair back, Heels to floor
* Break the bar, pull bar apart
* Keep breathe in the whole rep | E3MOM 21min
BUILD 2 Sets
00:00 5 @ 55 + 65%
03:00 3 @ 75%
HOLD 5 Sets
06:00 3 @ 85%
09:00 3 @ 85%
12:00 3 @ 85%
15:00 3 @ 85%
18:00 3 @ 85%

gymnastics:
Pull-ups: E2MOM 10 min
3-5 Reps. Lower as slow as you can. If you can do more than 5 reps, GO SLOWER.
NO BANDS. Step up hook or bench to get to the top.

hypertrophy.reasoning: Bench press and running tax chest, shoulders, triceps, and quads heavily; accessory work targets posterior chain and pulling muscles for balance.

siri_text: Wednesday's workout. Strength: Bench Press, 5 by 3 at 85 percent. Gymnastics: Pull-ups: E2MOM 10 min. Metcon: 1-Mile Run. Workout. For hypertrophy, focus on back, biceps, glutes.
